products.name: Sky Fighter Pro
products.description: The Sky Fighter Pro is our flagship fighter kite engineered for aggressive cuts and stable high-wind flight. Hand-tuned spars and premium ripstop deliver tournament-level performance for serious pilots.
products.shortDescription: High flying fighter kite with premium ripstop sail.

products.name: Crimson Striker
products.description: A bold red fighter kite with responsive handling and reinforced leading edges. Ideal for intermediate pilots stepping into competitive flying.
products.shortDescription: Responsive fighter kite for intermediate pilots.

products.name: Goldcrest Elite
products.description: Luxury gold-trimmed premium kite with hand-painted details and a velvet storage sleeve. A centerpiece for collectors and display flying.
products.shortDescription: Luxury collector kite with hand-painted details.

products.name: Rainbow Festival Delta
products.description: A vibrant delta kite that soars effortlessly in light winds. Perfect for picnics, beach days, and festival weekends with the whole family.
products.shortDescription: Colorful delta kite for light-wind fun.

products.name: Apex Competition X
products.description: Tournament-tuned competition kite with precision balance and minimal drag. Used by regional champions for precision and endurance events.

products.name: Little Cloud
products.description: A cheerful single-line kite sized for kids ages 5+. Easy assembly, soft edges, and bright colors make first flights stress-free.
products.shortDescription: Easy first kite for young pilots.

products.name: Tokyo Rokkaku
products.description: Traditional Japanese rokkaku design with modern reinforcement. Stable in moderate winds and stunning in the sky.

products.name: Brazilian Flow Box
products.description: Inspired by Brazilian box-kite traditions, this design offers a unique silhouette and steady lift in coastal breezes.

categories.name: Fighter Kites
categories.description: High-performance fighter kites built for speed, control, and competitive flying.

categories.name: Premium Kites
categories.description: Luxury materials and artisan finishes for collectors and enthusiasts.

categories.name: Festival Kites
categories.description: Colorful designs perfect for celebrations, parks, and family outings.

categories.name: Competition Kites
categories.description: Tournament-ready kites tuned for precision and consistent flight.

categories.name: Kids Kites
categories.description: Lightweight, easy-to-fly kites designed for young pilots.

categories.name: International Collection
categories.description: Traditional and modern designs inspired by kite cultures worldwide.

reviews.author: Aisha K.
reviews.text: Sky Fighter Pro handles like a dream. WhatsApp ordering was super quick and it arrived in perfect shape.

reviews.author: Marco D.
reviews.text: Best fighter kite I've owned. The build quality is obvious the moment you unpack it.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: Rainbow Festival Delta was a hit at our family picnic. Kids loved it!

reviews.author: James L.
reviews.text: Goldcrest Elite is stunning. Veltosports answered all my questions on WhatsApp before I ordered.

reviews.author: Elena R.
reviews.text: Fast shipping worldwide. Apex Competition X performed flawlessly at my regional meet.

reviews.author: Tom H.
reviews.text: Professional catalog, easy ordering. I'll be back for more from the International Collection.
